# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use RuntimeException;

class TwilioSmsService
{
    protected string $accountSid;
    protected string $authToken;
    protected string $from;
    protected string $baseUrl;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->accountSid = (string) config('services.twilio.account_sid', env('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID', ''));
        $this->authToken  = (string) config('services.twilio.auth_token', env('TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN', ''));
        $this->from       = (string) config('services.twilio.from', env('TWILIO_FROM', ''));
        $this->baseUrl    = (string) config('services.twilio.base_url', 'https://api.twilio.com');

        if ($this->accountSid === '' || $this->authToken === '' || $this->from === '') {
            throw new RuntimeException('Twilio credentials are not configured. Set services.twilio.account_sid, services.twilio.auth_token, and services.twilio.from (or corresponding env vars).');
        }
    }

    public function send(string $to, string $message, array $options = []): array
    {
        $to = trim($to);
        if ($to === '') {
            throw new RuntimeException('Recipient phone number is required.');
        }

        $body = [
            'To'   => $to,
            'From' => $options['from'] ?? $this->from,
            'Body' => $message,
        ];

        if (isset($options['status_callback'])) {
            $body['StatusCallback'] = $options['status_callback'];
        }

        if (isset($options['messaging_service_sid'])) {
            unset($body['From']);
            $body['MessagingServiceSid'] = $options['messaging_service_sid'];
        }

        $url = rtrim($this->baseUrl, '/') . '/2010-04-01/Accounts/' . $this->accountSid . '/Messages.json';

        $response = Http::asForm()
            ->withBasicAuth($this->accountSid, $this->authToken)
            ->post($url, $body);

        if ($response->failed()) {
            $payload = $response->json();
            Log::warning('Twilio SMS send failed', [
                'to' => $to,
                'status' => $response->status(),
                'response' => $payload ?: $response->body(),
            ]);

            $messageText = is_array($payload) && isset($payload['message'])
                ? $payload['message']
                : 'Twilio request failed.';

            throw new RuntimeException($messageText . ' (HTTP ' . $response->status() . ')');
        }

        return $response->json();
    }
}
